title: harness: Curated Agentic Harnesses for R Professional Roles
description: An R package, available on CRAN, that launches a command-line coding agent of the user's choice in a terminal tab pre-configured for a professional R role. Each role is a curated harness: a subset of community skills, a system prompt, a folder layout and quality gates. The package does not run an agent loop and does not call a language model; code written by the agent is run manually by the user, by design, as a human audit gate.
